network_policy: offline-only; inputs and tokenizer must already exist locally

deduplication.exact: SHA-256 over NFKC and whitespace-normalized content; policy is drop or reject
deduplication.near: word-ngram bottom-k MinHash/LSH candidates followed by exact Jaccard; pair-level report required
deduplication.report: deduplication-report.json with sample ids, split provenance, score, threshold, algorithm parameters and incomplete-candidate warning

required_before_run: dataset repository, revision and local input SHA-256
tokenizer repository, revision and local tree SHA-256
split JSONL SHA-256, row count, token count and source sample-id digest
frozen generation rubric and scorer revision
